name: plan_manifest_wave0_contract
description: Define the control-plane manifest contract for registry-first data plans and approvals before parallel implementation starts.

jobs.label: contract_control_manifest_registry
jobs.prompt:
## Goal
Create the exact implementation contract for registry-first data plans and approvals so the follow-on packets can work in parallel without inventing competing shapes.

## Architectural direction
We are intentionally mapping this feature to the SAME manifest lane the platform already uses, so plan/approval objects can be created from CLI/API/MCP/UI and remain agnostic. For this batch, prefer reusing the existing `app_manifests` + `app_manifest_history` persistence layer as the first-class registry backend unless the code proves that impossible.

## Read these files first
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/registry/repository.py`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/canonical_manifests.py`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/storage/postgres/workflow_runtime_repository.py`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/data_plane.py`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/contracts/data_contracts.py`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/handlers/workflow_run.py`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/handlers/workflow_query.py`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/helm_manifest.py`

## What to decide
Write one machine-readable contract file: `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/_control_manifest_registry_contract.json`

It must contain:
```json
{
  "backend": "app_manifests",
  "envelope": {
    "kind": "praxis_control_manifest",
    "manifest_family": "control_plane",
    "manifest_type": "data_plan | data_approval",
    "schema_version": 1,
    "required_fields": ["..."],
    "optional_fields": ["..."]
  },
  "plan_payload": {
    "status_values": ["draft", "approved", "applied"],
    "body_fields": ["plan", "plan_digest", "plan_summary", "compare_fields", "job", "workspace_root"]
  },
  "approval_payload": {
    "status_values": ["approved", "superseded"],
    "body_fields": ["approval", "plan_manifest_id", "plan_digest", "approved_by", "approval_reason", "approved_at"]
  },
  "runtime_rules": {
    "reconcile_persists_plan_when_pg_available": true,
    "approve_persists_approval_when_pg_available": true,
    "apply_loads_manifest_ids_before_file_paths": true,
    "files_are_fallback_only": true
  },
  "api_rules": {
    "manifest_get_returns_raw_control_manifest": true,
    "manifest_list_supports_control_plane_filtering": true
  },
  "touched_files": {
    "storage": ["..."],
    "runtime": ["..."],
    "surfaces": ["..."],
    "tests": ["..."]
  }
}
```

## Rules
- Use the ACTUAL repo structure, not guesses.
- Prefer the smallest durable change set that still makes plan/approval first-class manifest objects.
- Call out any place where the current app-manifest GET/list behavior would corrupt or hide control-plane manifests.
- Do not make code changes in this packet beyond writing the contract artifact.

Database: `$WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL`
